name: aia-copilot-bridge
description: Enhances GitHub Copilot with AIA's O(1) symbol lookup

commands.title: AIA: Reset Daily AI Update Counter

aia.symbolIndex.autoUpdate.description: Automatically update symbol index on file changes

aia.symbolIndex.includeInCopilotContext.description: Include symbol index in GitHub Copilot context

aia.symbolIndex.performanceTracking.description: Enable performance tracking for symbol lookups

aia.symbolIndex.debounceDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before triggering local symbol updates after file changes

aia.symbolIndex.symbolDebounceDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before triggering local symbol index updates

aia.symbolIndex.aiDebounceDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before triggering expensive AI context updates (60s default to reduce costs)

aia.symbolIndex.enableAIUpdates.description: ⚠️ Enable automatic AI-powered context updates (EXPENSIVE: requires API calls)

aia.symbolIndex.aiUpdateStrategy.description: Strategy for AI updates: manual (safest), time-based (periodic), smart (architectural changes only)

aia.symbolIndex.minAIUpdateInterval.description: Minimum interval between AI updates in milliseconds (10 minutes default to reduce costs)

aia.symbolIndex.smartUpdateThreshold.description: Number of significant file changes required to trigger smart AI update (higher = less aggressive)

aia.symbolIndex.promptBeforeExpensiveUpd.description: Show confirmation dialog before expensive AI operations

aia.symbolIndex.maxDailyAIUpdates.description: Maximum number of automatic AI updates per day (cost protection)

aia.symbolIndex.showAIUpdateNotification.description: Show notifications when expensive AI updates complete

aia.symbolIndex.watchFileTypes.description: File extensions to watch for auto-updates

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
